visa_type_detail.description: This is the most popular stream for young people aged 18-30 (or 35 in some countries) who wish to travel and work in Canada for up to two years. It does not require a job offer to apply, but you must have proof of funds and insurance.
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Age 18-30 (or 35 in some countries), citizens of eligible countries, meet financial requirements, have valid insurance, not have dependent children.

visa_type_detail.description: This stream allows young people aged 18-30 (or 35 in some countries) with a job offer in Canada to gain international work experience. The job offer must be for a skilled position (NOC TEER 0, 1, 2, or 3).
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Age 18-30 (or 35 in some countries), citizens of eligible countries, have a valid job offer from a Canadian employer, meet financial requirements, have valid insurance.

visa_type_detail.description: This stream is for foreign students aged 18-30 (or 35 in some countries) who are enrolled in a post-secondary institution and have a compulsory internship or work placement as part of their academic program.
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Age 18-30 (or 35 in some countries), citizens of eligible countries, enrolled in a post-secondary program, have a compulsory internship or work placement, meet financial requirements, have valid insurance.

essential_apps.description: Access government services and personal information related to benefits and pensions.
A digital health service offering virtual consultations with doctors.
Real-time public transportation information across Canadian cities.
Send and receive money securely between Canadian bank accounts.
Banking app for one of Canada's largest banks.
